title: Waterfall Phase Contract
description: Operational contract for a waterfall lifecycle phase, capturing entry/exit criteria, evidence requirements, assumptions, clarifications, and sign-off authority.

phase_name.description: Human-readable name for this phase (e.g. Requirements, Design)

status.description: Current status of the phase contract

owner.description: Person or role responsible for fulfilling this phase contract

start_date.description: Actual or planned start date for this phase (ISO 8601)

target_end_date.description: Target completion date for this phase (ISO 8601)

id.description: Unique identifier for this criterion (e.g. EC-1-001)

status.description: Fulfilment status of this entry criterion

entry_criteria.description: Conditions that must be true before this phase can begin

id.description: Unique identifier for this criterion (e.g. XC-1-001)

status.description: Fulfilment status of this exit criterion

evidence_ref.description: Reference to supporting evidence artefact (e.g. artefact ID or document path)

exit_criteria.description: Conditions that must be satisfied before this phase is considered complete

evidence_required.description: List of artefact IDs or document references required as evidence for gate passage

sign_off_authority.description: Role or person with authority to formally sign off this phase contract

assumptions.description: Assumptions that underpin this phase contract

clarifications.description: Open questions or decisions that must be resolved during this phase

mandatory_questions.description: Questions that must be explicitly answered before gate passage
